description_short: Bud is a true end-to-end system built to combat the complexities of the training industry.
description_long: Bud is a true end-to-end system built to combat the complexities of the training industry.

About Us.Mission Statement: Our mission is to simplify and enhance the process for educational institutions and employers through innovative technology.

Products/Services.name: Bud Mark
Products/Services.description: A marking and feedback tool that helps trainers provide timely and effective feedback to learners.

Products/Services.name: Training Management Reporting Suite
Products/Services.description: A comprehensive reporting suite that provides business leaders with full visibility of their entire operations, down to an individual learner/trainer level.

Case Studies.title: National Upskill
Case Studies.description: A new, privately owned and independent apprenticeship provider that chose Bud as its apprenticeship management system.

Case Studies.title: ANS
Case Studies.description: An established training provider that switched from Moodle to Bud, reducing manual data collation and administrative tasks.
